reviewerAccess.instructions: Open LEWORD Mobile, enter the production API URL, enter the reviewer mobile token, then run keyword analysis or open the recommendation inbox. Heavy keyword discovery runs on LEWORD API workers, not on the device.
reviewerAccess.tokenStorage: The mobile app keeps the typed API token in memory for the current session and sends it as an Authorization bearer token to the LEWORD API.

examples: device id derived from platform, brand, model, and OS version
dataLinkedToUser.purpose: Authentication, entitlement checks, and push delivery
Keyword analysis and mobile job execution

examples: job state and result cache keys
dataLinkedToUser.purpose: Recommendation inbox, job progress, and faster repeated requests

dataSharedWithThirdParties.condition: Only when push registration is enabled and LEWORD_MOBILE_PUSH_PROVIDER=expo or an Expo-compatible push gateway is configured

optionalDataCollection: push token and notification delivery data

sourceNotes: Apple requires app privacy details in App Store Connect and a privacy policy link in metadata and the app.
Google Play requires the Data safety form to describe collected/shared data and security practices.
